In the top-right panel, show an energetic outdoor ad with 4 children running under a blue sky, bold Japanese headline text, teal and yellow graphic accents, and a yellow circular callout. In the bottom-left panel, show a modern kindergarten campus building with a grassy yard and children playing, with a large white speech-bubble-shaped text area on the left and muted green-beige abstract shapes. In the bottom-right panel, show an illustrated large green tree with children and parents underneath, sky-blue background, warm family-friendly Japanese copy, and soft rounded decorative shapes. Lower on the screen, show the second right-aligned light-gray chat bubble with this Japanese text: 「日本語の健康食品の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」.
